hero.intro: Read like a Cp/Cpk control chart: each point is a documented result from the roles below, plotted against the upper spec limit (UCL). Every point sits inside limits — process in control.

experience.company: PT. Hyundai Energy Indonesia (Hyundai Mobis Group)
bullets: Analyzes and improves Work Instructions, Control Plan, PFMEA and Process Flow Chart; performs MES data analysis for Cp/Cpk under IATF 16949.
Manages equipment data in SAP Plant Maintenance — equipment hierarchies, locations, Preventive Maintenance scheduling, and spare parts.
Troubleshoots equipment failures via root cause analysis (PDCA / 5 Why), implements corrective actions, and reports to management.
Built a strategic plan around MTTR/MTBF, holding annual equipment downtime under 5%; submits monthly reports.
Led development of new models, ensuring accurate process implementation; designed, built and installed new machinery.
Analyzed production processes, improving efficiency by 100%; ran cost-down and labor-cost improvement activity.
Built Power BI dashboards to track production progress; supported ISO 9001 via Work Instructions and QC processes.
Participated in Yamaha Productivity Management (Kaizen); calculated standard and cycle times to optimize workflows.

experience.role: Student Internship — Production Engineer, Refrigerator BU
bullets: Analyzed machine operations in the refrigerator business unit to identify improvement areas.
Supported engineering staff and operators in troubleshooting.
Developed a sensor and actuator checking system in HMI, cutting estimated troubleshooting time by 70%.

education.deg: Bachelor's Degree, Computer Science (Binus Online Learning)
Associate's Degree, Electrical Engineering — Electronics Control

projects.title: Automated Piano Soundboard Pressing Machine
bullets: Led design and build of a high-speed automated soundboard pressing machine.
Mitsubishi PLC control system using Ladder Diagram programming.
Dual-sided loading system for continuous production.
Hydraulic hot press with precise temperature control.

projects.title: New Product Development
bullets: Led new product model development, aligning design specs with production.
Published development schedules, assembly and part drawings.
Coordinated cross-functional teams for on-time launches.
Designed new jigs and tooling; wrote work instructions and QC procedures.

projects.title: Cold Press Process Optimization
bullets: Ran a Kaizen event enabling simultaneous double-sided pressing.
Cut cycle time from 180 to 90 minutes — a 50% reduction, doubling productivity.
Solved space limitations with a new pressing configuration.

projects.title: Cleanroom Painting Robot
bullets: Managed the cleanroom environment for painting robots at Yamaha Music.
Ran weekly dust-quantity checks and analyzed data against quality standards.
